name: cortex-git
description: Sync your AI profile, persona, and memory across devices and AI platforms via Git.
long_description: Cortex keeps a single AI profile - persona, CLAUDE.md, and memory - in a private Git repo so every Claude install is identical. This bundle installs the cortex-git MCP server (a self-contained binary) for the Claude Desktop app and Cowork. Provide a Personal Access Token for your Git host and Cortex can clone, commit, push, and pull your profile repo directly. Pair it with the Cortex skills and a connected profile-repo folder for the full experience.

token.title: Personal Access Token
token.description: A Git host PAT with read/write access to your profile repo (e.g. a GitHub fine-grained token or a GitLab write_repository token). Stored by Claude and passed to the server as CORTEX_GIT_TOKEN; never written to the transcript.

host.title: Git host
host.description: The Git host the token is for. The token is only ever offered to this host.

username.title: Git username
username.description: Username for HTTPS basic auth. Both GitHub and GitLab accept any non-empty username alongside a PAT; the default is fine unless your host requires a specific one.

tools.name: git_status
tools.description: List changed files in the Cortex profile repo

tools.name: git_commit_push
tools.description: Commit all changed files and push to the remote

tools.name: git_pull
tools.description: Pull latest changes from the remote, force-updating the local branch (last-write-wins)

tools.name: git_clone
tools.description: Clone the Cortex profile repo to a local path

tools.name: git_init
tools.description: Initialise a new profile repo locally, commit the files in local_path, add the remote, and push (first-run setup against an empty remote)

tools.name: get_auth_status
tools.description: Check whether a PAT is available for a host and report its source (environment or credential store)

tools.name: set_credentials
tools.description: Store a Personal Access Token for a host in the OS keychain or encrypted-file fallback

tools.name: delete_credentials
tools.description: Remove the stored PAT for a host, e.g. to rotate a token
